name: _gcvt
title: _gcvt
syntax: void _gcvt(double val, int digits, char s[]);
description: The number val is converted to a string s containing a decimal point and a possible sign byte.

parameters.name: s
parameters.description: String, which contains the converted number. If the string size is too small, the string stays unchanged.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
